tool_args.label: TBTA toll violation enforcement measures
tool_args.raw_text: TBTA continues to make strides and build upon its toll violation enforcement measures. Many drivers attempt to evade tolls at TBTA crossings by obscuring, altering, or covering their license plates; displaying fraudulent plates; and failing to pay toll bills.

payload.claim_text: TBTA continues to make strides and build upon its toll violation enforcement measures. Many drivers attempt to evade tolls at TBTA crossings by obscuring, altering, or covering their license plates; displaying fraudulent plates; and failing to pay toll bills.

tool_args.label: Portable license plate readers added
tool_args.raw_text: Recently, TBTA has added portable license plate readers to its toolbox. These portable devices expand the monitoring of vehicles crossing TBTA's facilities, advancing TBTA's capabilities in recovering toll revenue.

payload.claim_text: TBTA has added portable license plate readers to its toolbox. These portable devices expand the monitoring of vehicles crossing TBTA's facilities, advancing TBTA's capabilities in recovering toll revenue.

tool_args.label: Support for legislative toll evasion measures
tool_args.raw_text: TBTA is equally committed to supporting legislative measures that address toll evasion, including proposals by Governor Hochul that would boost TBTA's ability to have DMV suspend vehicle registrations for unpaid tolls, confiscate license plate-covering devices, and increase penalties for intentionally obscuring plates on TBTA crossings and in Manhattan's Central Business District.

tool_args.label: Tolls NY Mobile App development
tool_args.raw_text: The Tolls NY App was designed to be a minimal viable product to help customers see the status of their toll payment. This is an industry term that means it was designed to be functional, straightforward, and basic in facilitating the main customer tasks of toll payment and E-ZPass account management.

payload.claim_text: The Tolls NY Mobile App was developed as a minimal viable product to help customers see the status of their toll payment, designed to be functional, straightforward, and basic in facilitating toll payment and E-ZPass account management.
payload.subject: TBTA

evidence_refs.source_quote: Education and TBTA's Award-Winning Tolls NY Mobile App

Vice President of Intelligent Transportation Systems & Tolling, Nichola Angel, stated that in TBTA's ongoing efforts to improve the customer experience, the agency identified customer service needs that led to the development of the Tolls NY Mobile App
